scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,auth,account,txn,budget,notify,worker,frontend,inngest -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white,red,gray,magenta "npm run dev -w @wisewallet/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w @wisewallet/auth-service" "npm run dev -w @wisewallet/account-service" "npm run dev -w @wisewallet/transaction-service" "npm run dev -w @wisewallet/budget-service" "npm run dev -w @wisewallet/notification-service" "npm run dev -w @wisewallet/worker-service" "npm run dev -w @wisewallet/frontend" "npm run dev:inngest"
scripts.dev:clean: npm run clean && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run generate -w @wisewallet/database && npm run build -w @wisewallet/frontend
